prompt: A moody, realistic indoor portrait of a young Muslim woman wearing a black hijab, a loose white blouse with slightly puffed sleeves, blue jeans, and white sneakers, seated casually in a dark brown leather armchair. She is posed in a relaxed, editorial way with one knee raised, one hand resting near her ankle, and the other hand holding a smartphone to the side of her face as if on a call. Frame the shot vertically from about mid-shin upward, centered composition, with her body angled slightly toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured or softly anonymized, with no detailed facial features visible. Use soft natural window light coming from the upper right, creating gentle shadows across a plain textured beige wall and adding a warm, quiet afternoon atmosphere. Emphasize realistic fabric folds in the draped hijab, crisp cotton texture in the blouse, denim texture, and a calm minimalist lifestyle aesthetic. Muted neutral color palette, shallow depth of field, candid fashion photography style, subtle grain, soft contrast, and an elegant contemporary editorial look.
